summary: RFC-002 Phase 1 & 2 backend API testing completed. 24/25 tests passed, 1 skipped due to backend bug. All core features working: System Settings, RBAC Roles, Leads CRUD + workflow, PCBs CRUD + workflow, Proposals CRUD + options, Job Types, Vendors.

critical.issue: Returns 500 - Job model requires 'site_address' field but convert_pcb_to_job() doesn't provide it
critical.fix: Add site_address field when creating Job in convert_pcb_to_job(). Suggest: site_address=pcb.get('address', 'TBD')

action_items: FIX: Add site_address field in convert_pcb_to_job() function at server.py line 3836-3844
critical_code_review_comments: convert_pcb_to_job() missing required site_address field when creating Job model - causes 500 error

success_rate.backend: 96% (24/25 tests passed, 1 skipped due to bug)

seed_data_creation: Test data created and cleaned up during tests (TEST_ prefixed leads, PCBs, proposals, vendors)
context_for_next_testing_agent: RFC-002 Phase 1 & 2 APIs tested. All endpoints working except POST /api/pcbs/{id}/convert which has a bug. System Settings returns google_maps_enabled=false as expected. 8 system roles exist: technician, lead_tech, dispatcher, manager, admin, accountant, sales, owner. PCB reason_category must be one of: follow_up, upsell, warranty, complaint, question, other. ProposalLineItem requires 'name' field.

rca_of_the_issue.root_cause: Job model in models.py requires site_address as a mandatory field (line 1248), but convert_pcb_to_job() in server.py (line 3836-3844) creates Job without providing site_address
rca_of_the_issue.mitigation: Add site_address field to Job creation in convert_pcb_to_job(). Example fix: site_address=pcb.get('address', 'Address TBD')

leads.GET /api/leads: PASS - returns leads list with filtering
leads.POST /api/leads: PASS - creates new lead with status 'new'
leads.PUT /api/leads/{id}: PASS - updates lead status through workflow (new->contacted->qualified->quoted->won/lost)
leads.GET /api/leads/metrics: PASS - returns total, by_status, by_source, lead_to_close_ratio

pcbs.POST /api/pcbs: PASS - creates new PCB with reason and follow-up date
pcbs.POST /api/pcbs/{id}/convert: FAIL - 500 error, missing site_address in Job creation
pcbs.GET /api/pcbs/metrics: PASS - returns total, open, by_status, conversion_rate, overdue_count

proposals.POST /api/proposals/{id}/options: PASS - adds Good/Better/Best options (requires 'name' in line_items)
proposals.GET /api/proposals/metrics: PASS - returns total, by_status, open_quotes, win_rate

job_types.GET /api/job-types: PASS - returns 4 default job type templates with checklists
